Answer: SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount) FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id;
SELECT c.customer_name FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.order_id IS NULL;
SELECT c.city, SUM(o.amount) AS revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.city ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE status = 'Completed' AND order_date BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-31';
